hero_text:
Control your house from everywhere.
Simple, smart and easy to use.
about_subtitle: A mobile application that lets you monitor and control your home's energy consumption — remotely, in real time, from anywhere.
overview_text: Most people have no clear picture of how much energy their home uses, or where it's being wasted. Domus Control gives you a live dashboard of every connected device, lets you switch them on or off remotely, and helps you build smarter habits through automation and scheduling.
features_text: Everything you need to manage your home from one place.
feature1_text: Switch lights, shutters, doors and heaters on or off from anywhere. Changes reflect on the hardware in under 2 seconds.
feature2_text: View daily and hourly consumption per device. Spot patterns and understand where your electricity goes.
feature3_text: Set timers, daily schedules and sleep mode. The heater adjusts automatically based on real outdoor temperature.
feature4_text: Share control with family members via a 6-digit code or direct link, with admin-managed roles.
feature5_text: Get alerts when a device changes state, a timer ends, or a family event occurs — even in the background.
feature6_text: Connect your smart speakers directly to your Spotify account and control playback from the app.
tech_text: Combining mobile development, cloud infrastructure and physical hardware into one integrated system.
team_text: Escola Profissional Bento de Jesus Caraça — 12.º GPSI-A, 2026.
tech_subtitle: A scale model of a real home, built from scratch to demonstrate Domus Control working with actual hardware — in real time.
devices_text: Every feature in the app has a real counterpart built into the model. Control them remotely and watch them respond almost instantly.
device1_text: LED strips installed per room. Toggle or dim them remotely, set schedules or let sleep mode turn them off automatically.
device2_text: Step motors open and close the window shutters. Fully controllable with timers and daily schedules from the app.
device3_text: A servo motor locks and unlocks the front door. Every unlock sends a push notification to all family members.
device4_text: A Peltier cell simulates heating and cooling. Adjusts automatically based on live outdoor temperature from OpenWeather.
device5_text: Integrated with Spotify. Control music playback directly from the app without switching between apps.
device6_text: Temperature sensors feed live readings back to Firebase. Used by the app to make automatic heating decisions.
hardware_text: Every component was chosen to keep the system responsive, reliable and close to what a real smart home would use.
comp1_text: The brain of the model. Connects to Wi-Fi, listens to Firebase and controls every device in real time.
comp2_text: Drive the shutter mechanism. Precise angle control allows full open, full close and everything in between.
comp3_text: Controls the door lock. Rotates to a locked or unlocked position on command from the app.
comp4_text: Thermoelectric module that heats or cools depending on polarity. Used to simulate a real home heater.
comp5_text: Installed across all rooms of the model. Individually addressable and controlled per room via Firebase.
comp6_text: Reads the ambient temperature inside the model and reports back to the app in real time.
sobre_subtitle: Three students from 12.º GPSI at Escola Profissional Bento de Jesus Caraça, brought together by a smart home project for the 2026 Professional Aptitude Test.
context_text1: Domus Control was born as part of the PAP — Prova de Aptidão Profissional — of the IT Systems Management and Programming course (GPSI), at Escola Profissional Bento de Jesus Caraça, in the 2025/2026 academic year.
context_text2: The goal was to demonstrate the technical skills acquired over three years, integrating software development, electronics and design into a real, functional solution.
who_text: Each member contributed with their area of expertise to the final result.
disciplines_text: The project brought together knowledge from two technical disciplines of the course.
disc1_desc: Responsible for developing the mobile application in Flutter, integration with Firebase Realtime Database and external APIs — OpenWeather, Spotify, Translate and IMBB.
disc2_desc: Responsible for building the physical scale model, programming the ESP32 and wiring the hardware components — LEDs, stepper motors, temperature sensor and Peltier cell.
motivation_text1: Most people have no real idea how much energy their home uses, or where the waste comes from. Appliances left on by accident, no remote control, no automation — these are everyday problems.
motivation_text2: Domus Control came from the desire to fix that with accessible technology — combining an intuitive app, real-time communication and a physical scale model that makes the system tangible and demonstrable.
download_subtitle: Download Domus Control and start managing your smart home today. Available for Android.
download_desc: Requires Android 7.0 or higher. You may need to allow installation from unknown sources.
banner_text: Get the app and take control of your home today.
